chunks.text: C.P No.D-502 of 2015 1 HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No.D-502 of 2015 Before Mr. Justice Mohammad Ali Mazhar Mr. Justice Adnan-ul-Karim Memon Pirah Soomro, Petitioner: Ali Assadullah Bullo, advocate through Province of Sindh and another: Mr. Abdul Jaleel Zubedi, A.A.G respondents, through Date of hearing: 23-12-2016 Date of Order: 23-12-2016 O R D E R MOHAMMAD ALI MAZHAR---J.,The petitioner has approached this Court for appointment on deceased son quota. The mother of the petitioner was Primary School Teacher who expired on 10-08-2014 during Service. The comments of Director Schools Education, Hyderabad Region Hyderabad, are available on record. In response to the Para-7 of the Petitioner, it is clearly stated that the Petitioner may be directed to submit Service Book of deceased, Death Certificate, Heir ship Certificate, Affidavit from other legal heirs of their No-objection, Computerized National Identity Card and Academic Credential. 2. The learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that these documents were supplied earlier but again the petitioner will submit these documents to the respondent No.2. 3. Let these documents be submitted again to the respondent No.2 where-after the case of the petitioner will be considered for her C.P No.D-502 of 2015 2 appointment in terms of Rule 11-A of the Sindh Civil Servants (Appointment, Transfer & Promotion) Rules, 1974 within sixty days time. The Constitution Petition stand disposed of. J u d g e J u d g e BrohiPS
